arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta warns Liverpool that his Arsenal side will push them all the way in the title race - despite the Gunners slipping nine points behind Arne Slot's men
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta insists Arsenal will be in title contention with Liverpool until the very end and has warned doubters that no team in Premier League history has won all their games.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends title race message to Liverpool as Arsenal seek to 'hammer' leaders
arts.sum: Arsenal are nine points behind Premier League leaders Liverpool but can close the gap against Brentford on New Year's Day and Mikel Arteta wants to ramp up the pressure on the Reds

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta points out Arsenal's 'moaner' and makes feelings clear on his behaviour
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta concedes that Leandro Trossard is the biggest moaner in the team but doesn't want him to change as he hailed the Belgian's competitive streak

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus should be dropped for Arsenal's clash with Brentford as Kai Havertz record assessed
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at why Kai Havertz could be the difference for Arsenal in their Premier League London derby with Brentford on New Year's Day.

arts.ttl: Arsenal urged to sign 'perfect' Bukayo Saka replacement as Mikel Arteta eyes £90m transfer
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has been told West Ham's Mohammed Kudus could be the ideal replacement for injured Gunners winger Bukayo Saka. Adrian Clarke, who began his career at Arsenal and played for the team from 1991 to 1997, has identified Kudus as the perfect player for Arteta to target, describing him as the "perfect" stand-in for Saka in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank sets Brentford clear challenge ahead of Arsenal as honest set-piece admission made
arts.sum: "Arsenal is the best set-piece team not only in the Premier League but in the world right now," said Frank in a press conference. Brentford boss Thomas Frank has hailed Arsenal as the "best set-piece team" in world football ahead of their New Year’s Day clash.

arts.ttl: Newcastle keeping close eye on player despite drop off this season – Arsenal and Liverpool also in the mix
arts.sum: Newcastle United are continuing to monitor PSV Eindhoven’s Johan Bakayoko, but Arsenal and Liverpool are also keeping an eye on him. That’s according to Het Belang van Limburg, who report that the Premier League’s ‘major powers’ still like the 21-year-old. arts.ttl: Brentford move ahead of Brighton in race for player – Club open to sale after contact made
arts.sum: Brentford have moved ahead of Brighton and Hove Albion for Fiorentina’s Michael Kayode after both made moves earlier this month. That’s according to Sport Italia and journalist Alfredo Pedullà, who say Brentford can now be considered ahead of Brighton at this moment in time. arts.ttl: Arsenal handed major suspension update before Brentford amid Virgil van Dijk example
arts.sum: Arsenal are in the midst of preparing for their first game of 2025 which will be a Premier League clash away to Brentford on New Year's Day. T he Gunners currently sit in third on 36 points but a win will take them back above Nottingham Forest and to within six points of leaders Liverpool. The statement to X read: "Jhon Duran has been charged following the Premier League fixture between Newcastle United and Aston Villa on Thursday 26 December 2024.

arts.ttl: Arsenal halfway season review: Mikel Arteta sent Champions League message as Premier League verdict delivered
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole that the Gunners have a better chance of winning the Champions League than the Premier League this season.
